name: Naturia Gaiastrio
name_jp: ナチュル・ガイアストライオ
desc:
2 EARTH Synchro Monsters
During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets exactly 1 card on the field (and no other cards): You can send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff:
2 EARTH Synchro Monsters
During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets exactly 1 card on the field (and no other cards): You can send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff:
2 EARTH Synchro Monsters
During either player's turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets exactly 1 card on the field (and no other cards): You can send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Synchro Monsters as Fusion Materials
